goal: Registry 2.0.0 (operator-ruled option A, phase3-storage-design.md): move duplicated per-element file-grain rawFacts to a single file-keyed rawFactsByFile map on the semantic-registry projection; drop pretty-print above 10MB at the write site. coderef-core's own registry measures 124MB at HEAD; PS measured 209MB in May. P2 re-grounds measurements + fixes the vector-store fallback naming.

tasks.description: Failing tests __tests__/semantic-registry-v2.test.ts: version 2.0.0; entries carry NO rawFacts; rawFactsByFile keyed by file holds each file's facts exactly once; empty-bundle case omits the map
projections.ts: 2.0.0 shape (top-level rawFactsByFile, entry.rawFacts removed); registry-generator.ts: compact stringify when serialized size > 10MB
Rebuild + repopulate coderef-core; record semantic-registry.json size delta (124MB baseline) as paired evidence
Repopulate Primary-Sources; record its registry size under 2.0.0 vs the May 209MB observation
VECTOR-STORE-PATH-FIX: honest fallback naming - default storagePath stays coderef-vectors.json but rag-status/docs stop calling it sqlite; CODEREF_SQLITE_PATH env documented as legacy alias

plan_type_rationale: Two sequential phases: format change (writer-side, no in-tree reader exists), then measurement re-ground + the sibling vector-store naming fix.
